mapper.jsonStringBodyContent: {"model":"claude-sonnet-4-5","max_tokens":1024,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"You are a social media content expert for Cognflow, an AI automation agency. Generate platform-specific captions based on the brief below. Respond ONLY in this exact format with no extra text: LINKEDIN: write a professional caption with hashtags max 150 words INSTAGRAM: write an engaging caption with emojis and hashtags max 100 words TWITTER: write a concise punchy caption with hashtags max 280 characters Content Brief: Topic:  {{1.`0`}} Tone: {{1.`1`}} CTA: {{1.`2`}} Keywords:  {{1.`3`}}"}]}
